summary: Start M6-CLIENT-ALPHA-SURFACES-001 after M6-START-TO-VICTORY-SIM-LOOP-001 closed on origin/main. The client_engineer must implement complete Alpha playability, policy, event, encyclopedia, map candidate, AI/adviser reason, save/checkpoint, and victory/failure surfaces through read models and command submission without directly mutating authoritative WorldState.

tests_run.result: Task JSON is valid before start.
M6-CLIENT-ALPHA-SURFACES-001 and M6-LAYERED-AI-001 are dependency-ready; client surfaces selected first by ready order.

decisions: Start the client surfaces task first from the dependency-ready M6 set.
Keep client surfaces read-model/command driven; no direct WorldState mutation or duplicated sim-core authority.
Manual node battle, telemetry, server accounts, desktop file bridge, arbitrary-code mod UI, release, and commercial decisions remain excluded.
risks: R3 client work crosses app and shared client packages, so QA review and browser/storybook/playwright gates are required before acceptance.
The task must avoid storing full WorldState in Redux/client stores and must keep Pixi ownership inside map-renderer boundaries.
requested_action: Implement M6 client Alpha surfaces within allowed paths, run required tests where available, and emit REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer.
